svg.text: Matched-pair differences across 25 entities — AI E3 (mean of 3 seeds) vs human
Each dot = one entity. Filled tick = corpus mean. Right margin: mean ± SD and direction-consistency count.
Per-row x-axis is symmetric around zero in that metric's native units; widths within a panel are comparable, across panels are not.
n=25 matched entity pairs (Human vs mean of 3 E3 seeds per entity).
